title: Comatose Asuka Body Pillow
wikitext:
[]: Comatose Asuka Body Pillow? Post by Tumbling Down » Wed May 20, 2015 2:41 pm A friend of mine suggested that an Asuka body pillow could be used to re-enact the opening scene of The End of Evangelion . The concept was absolutely hilarious to both of us, and now we're both wondering if there's a (presumably fan-made) body pillow out there patterned specifically after her look in that scene. Have any of you guys seen one?

[]: Post by The Eva Monkey » Wed May 20, 2015 3:31 pm SPOILER: Show

[]: Post by Tumbling Down » Wed May 20, 2015 3:35 pm You just made this even funnier. I'm grinning as I'm typing this very sentence. God bless you, Eva Monkey.

[]: Post by Guy Nacks » Wed May 20, 2015 3:40 pm I can't be surprised by this kind of depravity anymore after learning that a restaurant was/is selling a drink themed after Shinji's cumshot in EOE.

[]: Post by Tumbling Down » Wed May 20, 2015 3:45 pm Guy Nacks wrote: I can't be surprised by this kind of depravity anymore after learning that a restaurant was/is selling a drink themed after Shinji's cumshot in EOE.

[]: Post by SEELE-01 » Wed May 20, 2015 4:13 pm I'm not sure what is the most disturbing thing so far... The pillow idea, the cum drink or the fact someone is asking for more info on the subject... And all that in 5 posts...

[]: Post by Guy Nacks » Wed May 20, 2015 4:44 pm Tumbling Down wrote: Are you serious? I really hope you are. Do you have a source on this?

[]: Post by Tumbling Down » Wed May 20, 2015 4:54 pm Guy Nacks wrote: [url]http://forum.evageeks.org/thread/15899/Would-you-chug-down-Shinjis-Now-you-can/[/url] It was an actual drink that was for some Eva themed "Nerv Bar" somewhere in Japan. This is from February of last year when Xard stumbled upon the actual ad for it. The resulting thread was possibly the only good thing to come of such product.

[]: Post by Sicarius VI » Wed May 20, 2015 6:00 pm You know from looking at this thread and others, I'd really like to know where Eva Monkey gets his supply of Gifs. As for the two topics, well they can't be worse then Boku no Pico. With the body pillow actually, IIRC I saw an artical explaining that a Otaku married a blow up doll or body pillow of Asuka. I completely forget where I saw this, but I happened to remember it.

[]: Post by FreakyFilmFan4ever » Wed May 20, 2015 6:10 pm I'm now imagining a lot of guys drinking cumshots at the bar with their unconscious Asuka body pillow waifus. It's not a fun image.

[]: Post by The Eva Monkey » Wed May 20, 2015 6:47 pm Sicarius VI wrote: You know from looking at this thread and others, I'd really like to know where Eva Monkey gets his supply of Gifs.

[]: Post by Tumbling Down » Wed May 20, 2015 6:52 pm FreakyFilmFan4ever wrote: I'm now imagining a lot of guys drinking cumshots at the hat with their unconscious Asuka body pillow waifus. It's not a fun image.

[]: Post by El Squibbonator » Wed May 20, 2015 6:53 pm I've only got two words for this: Kimochi warui.

[]: Post by AR-99 » Wed May 20, 2015 8:35 pm So those pillows have 2 sides. One's pre-shaking and the other's after? This is just so many different kinds of wrong.

[]: Post by Shamsiel-kun » Thu May 21, 2015 3:27 pm AR-99 wrote: So those pillows have 2 sides. One's pre-shaking and the other's after? This is just so many different kinds of wrong.

[]: Post by FreakyFilmFan4ever » Thu May 21, 2015 4:00 pm This thread physically hurts. Not that I would have expected anything different coming in here, and to be fair, it doesn’t hurt any worse (or even as much) as the NGE episodes themselves.

[]: Post by Tumbling Down » Thu May 21, 2015 11:49 pm FreakyFilmFan4ever wrote: it doesn’t hurt any worse (or even as much) as the NGE episodes themselves.

[]: Post by Guy Nacks » Fri May 22, 2015 5:04 pm Evangelion brings a lot of pain upon its viewership for various reasons.

[]: Post by robersora » Fri May 22, 2015 5:21 pm Ganbare, Evageeks. Ganbare.

[]: Post by Chuckman » Fri May 22, 2015 9:07 pm If you do this thing I will cast dooms upon you.
